summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Recommended Traders' feature. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified Recommended tab, recommendation cards with match reasons, offers/wants tags, and Connect button functionality.
passed_tests: GET /api/network/recommended - Returns 200 OK
GET /api/network/recommended - Response has recommendations array and total_matches
GET /api/network/recommended - Each recommendation has id, name, match_score, reason fields
GET /api/network/recommended - Shows offers_you_want list (items they offer that you want)
GET /api/network/recommended - Shows wants_you_offer list (items they want that you offer)
GET /api/network/recommended - Shows human-readable match reason (Offers X • Wants Y)
GET /api/network/recommended - Match score calculated correctly (+15 per offer match, +10 per want match)
GET /api/network/recommended - Excludes already connected users
GET /api/network/recommended - Excludes users with pending requests
GET /api/network/recommended - Excludes current user (self)
GET /api/network/recommended - Empty state when user has no preferences
GET /api/network/recommended - Empty state when no matches found
GET /api/network/recommended - Limit parameter works correctly
GET /api/network/recommended - Requires authentication (401 without auth)
Integration: Get recommendation -> Send connect request -> User excluded from recommendations
Frontend: Recommended tab visible with sparkle icon
Frontend: Badge count shows number of recommendations
Frontend: Match banner shows 'X traders match your interests'
Frontend: Recommendation cards show user name, avatar, location
Frontend: Recommendation cards show match reason in yellow text
Frontend: Green 'Offers:' tags show what they offer that you want
Frontend: Orange 'Wants:' tags show what they want that you offer
Frontend: Connect button sends network request
Frontend: User removed from recommendations after Connect click
Frontend: Sent request appears in Requests tab
seed_data_creation: Created test users with matching goods: TEST_MatcherUser (offers Fresh Eggs, Honey; wants Seeds), TEST_NoMatchUser (offers Lumber, Firewood; wants Tools, Nails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recommended Traders feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/network/recommended calculates match scores: +15 for each item they offer that you want, +10 for each item they want that you offer. Excludes connected users and pending requests. Frontend has Recommended tab (first tab) with sparkle icon, shows badge count, displays rich recommendation cards with match reason, offers/wants tags, and Connect button. Connect button sends POST /api/network/request and removes user from recommendations.

Backend API.GET /api/network/recommended: Working - returns recommendations with match scores
Backend API.Recommendation Fields: id, name, avatar, location, is_verified, skills, match_score, offers_you_want, wants_you_offer, reason
Backend API.Match Score Calculation: +15 per offer match, +10 per want match

Frontend Components.Recommended Tab: First tab with sparkle icon and badge count
Frontend Components.Recommendation Cards: User info, match reason, offers/wants tags, Connect button
Frontend Components.Connect Button: Sends network request, removes user from list
